scripts.test:guards: npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:check && npm run guard:object-names && npm run guard:layering && npm run guard:catalog-layering && npm run guard:catalog-runtime-boundary && npm run guard:tool-workspace-ui && npm run guard:catalog-migrations && npm run guard:client-imports && npm run guard:command-planning && npm run guard:vocabulary && npm run guard:turn-effects && npm run guard:serialized-access && npm run guard:smoke-wrangler
scripts.test: npm run test:guards && vitest run --reporter=dot tests/net tests/client/ tests/command-utils.test.ts tests/planning-world.test.ts tests/executor.test.ts tests/source-hash.test.ts tests/turn-recorder.test.ts tests/v2-browser-journal.test.ts tests/v2-browser-local-turn.test.ts tests/v2-browser-worker.integration.test.ts tests/v2-browser-intent-policy.test.ts tests/shadow-browser-node.test.ts tests/shadow-commit-scope.test.ts tests/shadow-relay-cache.test.ts tests/shadow-turn-exec.test.ts tests/v2-state-transfer-warmfill.test.ts tests/mcp-warm-authority.test.ts tests/v2-capability-gossip-routing.test.ts tests/v2-browser-delegation.test.ts tests/dev-v2-durable-turn-parity.test.ts tests/dev-v2-fanout.test.ts tests/v2-fanout-projection.test.ts tests/scope-executor-garden-probe.test.ts tests/movement-projection.test.ts tests/v2-turn-network-spec.test.ts tests/v2-reply-predicates.test.ts tests/v2-browser-holder-install.test.ts tests/v2-browser-cache.test.ts tests/v2-browser-execution-cache.test.ts tests/cf-do-migrations.test.ts tests/clone-plain-data.test.ts tests/smoke-walkthrough-harness.test.ts tests/net-metrics-report.test.ts tests/task-time.test.ts tests/object-host-write-through.test.ts tests/conformance.test.ts tests/dev-v2-commit.test.ts tests/mcp.test.ts tests/persistence.test.ts tests/smoke/v2-mcp-smoke.test.ts tests/session-lifecycle.test.ts tests/worker/rpc-fault-inject.test.ts tests/worker/cf-local-structural.test.ts tests/worker/net-turn-structure.test.ts tests/worker/net-load-skew.test.ts tests/worker/net-outbox-bounded.test.ts tests/worker/net-wire-contract.test.ts tests/worker/net-cutover-freeze.test.ts tests/worker/net-install.test.ts tests/worker/net-install-doorway.test.ts tests/worker/net-identity-door.test.ts tests/worker/net-mcp.test.ts tests/b-i-read-closure-parity.test.ts tests/a2-fanout-lineage-closure.test.ts tests/b-iii-incremental-merge.test.ts
scripts.test:worker: npm run test:guards && vitest run --reporter=dot tests/worker tests/v2-mcp-e2e.test.ts tests/smoke
scripts.test:e2e:share: playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts -g "pinboard shares created notes with another user|pinboard shared notes survive a peer reload|outliner shares committed items with another user"
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run catalog:index && npm run catalog:check && npm run guard:object-names && npm run guard:layering && npm run guard:catalog-layering && npm run guard:catalog-runtime-boundary && npm run guard:tool-workspace-ui && npm run guard:catalog-migrations && npm run guard:client-imports && npm run guard:command-planning && npm run guard:vocabulary && npm run guard:turn-effects && npm run guard:serialized-access && npm run guard:smoke-wrangler
